title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Calcutta. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
